name: The Diary Of A Final Girl N
description:
So mostly doing this just for fun, but this is a version of a human AU and this is my version of ~N~

You can read it on Wattpad by the same name

N/Nate is having to deal with living a double life, the life he wants for himself and the life his dad wants for him, the "family" has high hopes for the young son of the leader, but N's just trying to pass his math class while trying to get the parents that he's a normal teen. His dad is a cult leader and he’s just trying too vibe.
creator: It_Messy_13
